title: amxx-builder manifest
description: Manifest file for the amxb build tool (amxx-builder)

name.description: Project name. Used as a {name} placeholder in archive_name and amxmodx_path.

version.description: Project version. Used as a {version} placeholder in archive_name. Can be overridden via --set version=X or the action 'version' input.
amxxpc compiler version to use. Format: major.minor.build (e.g. "1.10.5428"). Omit to use the latest available.

dir.description: Name of the amxmodx directory inside each repo (default: "amxmodx").

token_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the GitHub PAT (default: "GITHUB_TOKEN").

ssh.description: Use SSH instead of HTTPS for git clone (default: false).

plugins_ini_postfix.description: Global postfix appended to generated plugins-<postfix>.ini filenames. Each repo gets its own INI file.

deps.description: Global include dependencies (.inc files) applied to all plugin compilations.

repos.description: GitHub repositories to pull AMX Mod X content from.

dir.description: Directory to write the output archive or copied files (default: "./dist").

amxmodx_path.description: Path of the amxmodx directory inside the archive (default: "addons/amxmodx").

assets_path.description: Local directory whose contents are copied to the archive root alongside amxmodx_path.

readme.description: Include the project README.md in the archive root (default: false).

generate_ini.description: Generate plugins-*.ini files listing compiled plugins (default: true).

pack.description: Create a zip archive. Set to false to copy files to output.dir instead — useful for CI artifacts (default: true).

on_conflict.description: How to handle duplicate files when multiple repos provide the same path (default: "last_wins").

depEntry.description: An include dependency. Either a shorthand string or an object.

include_path.description: Path inside the repo or release asset where .inc files are located.

source.description: How to fetch the dependency: "git" clones the repo, "release" downloads a release asset (default: "git").

asset.description: For source=release: which release asset to download.

oneOf.description: Glob pattern matching the release asset filename (e.g. "*-include*.zip").
Zero-based index of the release asset.

repoEntry.description: A GitHub repository to include. Either a shorthand string or an object.

ref.description: Tag, branch, commit SHA, or "latest" (resolves to the latest GitHub release).

amxmodx_dir.description: Override the amxmodx directory name for this repo (defaults to manifest.amxmodx.dir).

plugins_ini_postfix.description: Override the INI postfix for this repo.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude when copying content from this repo.

exclude_files.description: Specific filenames to exclude from this repo.

deps_override.description: Explicit dep list for this repo, replacing the auto-detected DEPS_LIST file.
